description: Configure a multi-state sales tax structure in Magento. Create a Product Tax Class named 'Physical Goods' and three tax rates: 'US-CA-7.25' (California, 7.25%), 'US-NY-8.00' (New York, 8.00%), and 'US-TX-6.25' (Texas, 6.25%). Establish a Tax Rule named 'US Multi-State Sales Tax' that applies these rates to the 'Physical Goods' product class and 'Retail Customer' customer class. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
